channel.title: KingshotData.kr — Core Updates (EN)
channel.description: Major update alerts for gift codes, guides, heroes, buildings, war academy research, and core database content.

item.title: Kingshot Gift Code Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Latest coupon codes, expiration dates, permanent codes, and redemption guide.

item.title: Kingshot Guides Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Integrated list of newly added and updated guides.

item.title: Kingshot Heroes Data Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Latest hero stats, skills, and generation data updates.

item.title: Kingshot Buildings Data Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Updated resource costs, construction time, and power values by building level.

item.title: Kingshot War Academy Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Research requirements, costs, bonus effects, and full upgrade data for Truegold Infantry, Marksman, and Cavalry research.

item.title: Kingshot Database Update
item.dc:creator: Ten
item.description: Latest updates for equipment, charms, max level data, and other database items.
